def test_bitcount_127():
    from source import bitcount
    count = bitcount(127)
    assert count == 7, f"Expected bit count of 7 for 127, but got {count}"

def test_bitcount_128():
    from source import bitcount
    count = bitcount(128)
    assert count == 1, f"Expected bit count of 1 for 128, but got {count}"
